title: Audasi Active Moving Pet Plush Toy Interactive Dog Toys for Boredom Bouncing Piggy Dog Toy Shaking Talking Dog Ball for Dogs Cats Pets Washable Cartoon Pig Squeaky Plush Dog Toy
features: 【Active Moving Pet Plush Toy】Dog anxiety toy brings joy to your dog with lively sounds and jumping movements. It can be charged via USB port and has two modes of recording and music, you can record the sound that makes your dog excited or play the music directly. Pets will want to chase the ball, bite, chase and run along with the recording or music.It adds interactive fun and stimulates your pet's vitality to play happily.

【Bounce and Squeak Fun】This interactive toy has realistic sounds that respond to shaking and touch, enticing your pet to interact with it. Its versatile design provides entertainment and training while keeping them company.The dog interactive toys can also keep your pet company when you're away, helping them exercise and play.Focus can be achieved through irresistible bouncing and squeaking, which helps them burn off energy and relieve stress and anxiety, making them calmer and more relaxed.

【Convenient to Operate】This puppy interactive toy is simple to use, simply press the switch on the vibrating ball and the dog toy will go into recording mode, when the recording is finished it will play the recording and start vibrating.Press the switch again and the dog toy will go into music mode and start vibrating.This simple design makes it easy for dog owners to entertain their dogs with this toy.

【Easy to Install & Washable】This pig dog toy interactive toy is easy to remove and clean, simply open the velour on the plush cover from the back, remove the moving dog toy, wash the plush cover with water and place in a ventilated area to dry.Practical and easy to handle, this also ensures your pet always has a clean, safe toy to play with.

【Widespread Use】This interactive dog ball can be played in halls, parks, gardens, lawns, beaches and anywhere you like.Stimulate your dog's intelligence and keep them entertained. The dog moving toy is wrapped with a thick pig sheath on the outside, double protection from dog bites and unleash your dog's nature to tear around.

keepa.title: BOJACK 4 Values 64 pcs 3 5 10 13 A amp 240 V Volt Household Mains Plug Fuse 6.3x25 mm 0.25x1Inch BS1362 Ceramic Tube Cartridge Fuses Assortment Kit packag in a Clear Plastic Box
features: BOJACK High Quality Ceramic Tube Cartridge Fuses Assortment Kit
Package Quantity: 64pcs Packed in A plastic storage case
keepa.description: BOJACK High Quality Ceramic Tube Cartridge Fuses Assortment Kit Fuse Dimension:6.3x25 mm /0.25x1Inch Fuse Voltage: 240 V Packing quantity: 64pcs Fuses Package Quantity BS1362------3A------ 20PCS BS1362------5A------ 20PCS BS1362-----10A----- 20PCS BS1362-----13A----- 20PCS The role of the fuse：When a circuit malfunctions or is abnormal, the current is constantly rising, and the increased current may damage some important components or valuable components in the circuit, or it may burn the circuit or even cause a fire.The fuse will cut off the current when the current abnormally rises to a certain height and a certain time, thereby protecting the safe operation of the circuit.
